name: LOXTR
description: LOXTR helps exporters, importers, and distributors digitize and optimize their entire global trade workflow. It combines customs compliance automation, AI-driven B2B lead generation, freight rate forecasting, and CRM into a single unified platform.

core_products.name: LoxConvert
core_products.description: AI customs document analyzer. Upload invoices, packing lists, or bills of lading and get instant HS code classification, tariff rates, and compliance checks.

core_products.name: AI Lead Radar
core_products.description: B2B buyer discovery engine. AI generates fresh, verified potential buyer companies for your specific product and target markets with confidence scores.

core_products.name: LOX Predict
core_products.description: Freight rate forecasting for container shipping routes with 6-month price predictions, confidence intervals, and AI-generated market insights.

core_products.name: LOXTR CRM
core_products.description: Purpose-built CRM for international trade with lead management, AI email generation, campaign automation, and supply chain intelligence.
